story: Frank stared out at the oak and the waiting Reaper while Mary’s voice coaxed him to loosen his grip. After a lifetime of holding on, he finally whispered his consent: “Okay. You can take her.” On his drive over, Micah received a text from the hospital: if the family agreed, they could transfer Mary home to hospice by evening. A moment later Micah opened the front door. “You ready, G-Dad?”
implausible_knowledge: On his drive over, Micah received a text from the hospital: if the family agreed, they could transfer Mary home to hospice by evening.
question: When Micah arrives and asks if he’s ready, what will Frank do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Stay home to prepare a room and ask Micah to call back to authorize Mary’s transfer to hospice at home.
answer_without_knowledge: Leave with Micah to go to the hospital to say goodbye to Mary.
